name: CMS: High-Impact Use Case Risk-Assessed
description: High-impact AI use cases (per OMB M-25-21) undergo a CMS AI governance risk assessment and apply minimum risk-management practices.
rationale: CMS BR-AI-2: a high-impact use case must meet minimum risk management practices in accordance with OMB M-25-21; a CMS AI governance risk assessment determines high-impact status.

examples.passes: the CMS AI rule's evidence is present

source: CMS Technical Reference Architecture (TRA) — Artificial Intelligence Guidance (Business Rules BR-AI-1..6 and recommended practices; references OMB M-25-21/M-25-22, NIST AI RMF, HHS AI policy). https://www.cms.gov/tra/Foundation/FD_0080_Foundation_AI_Guidance.htm
